text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Early into the new year, Sakura Bakushin O and I
make our first shrine visit of the year.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, do you know the proper etiquette for
visiting a shrine?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You must be a little nervous, right? But I'm with
you, so don't worry!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to show you a Bakushin-style Shrine
Visit!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: First off, you clap your hands! Clap, clap, clap...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Then you praise the gods to put them in a good
mood.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
After that, and make sure you say it with a
friendly smile...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: PLEASE EXCUSE MY PRESENCE!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And then you bow formally. Properly excusing
yourself for the intrusion is the most basic of
fundamentals when it comes to manners!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Then you can follow up with your wish. You say it
loud and clear, so that it reaches the heavens!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Then you clap in admiration of your own brilliant
wish. Finally, you do another bow. And that's it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Did you get that all?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After listening to everything she has to say, I
teach her the correct way to do it...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I wish to be able to achieve a Bakushin victory in
all my senior-year races!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O's cheerful wish reverberates
throughout the tranquil New Year's sky.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I came across something interesting!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It seems you can write your wishes on those little
wooden boards.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's a chance to show off my penmanship to the
gods!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
In addition! I'll get double points if I utilize your
wish as well!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If I have double the wish power, there's no way
the gods could ignore me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Don't hold back! Go ahead and write down your
wish for me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's not like you really need to... Seeing as
I'm already quite the outstanding genius!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, I write...
choice_data_list:
I want Sakura Bakushin O to become super
healthy and remarkable.

I want Sakura Bakushin O to become the
ultimate model Umamusume.

I want Sakura Bakushin O to attain a weapon
other than super speed.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! I see. Even though I'm already healthy and
remarkable!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
SUPER healthy and remarkable! Haha, the
infirmary would be a distant thought.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to dash energetically throughout the
new year! Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Eh?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'm already a model Umamusume... You're saying I should be even more of a model Umamusume?!
choice_data_list: You'd be able to do anything.
You'd be able to do anything.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh? Anything, you say? Like?
choice_data_list: You know, studying and so forth...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I see!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I might be extraordinary, but when it comes to
studying, I'm near the rear of the pack...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...And that's the unfortunate truth.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I got it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'll ask the gods to increase my workload to
become an even greater role model!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
A weapon other than my speed? Well, there are a
lot of other things I could practice...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Speed-eating, speed-changing, being quick to
rise, as well as fast to sleep, jumping to hasty
conclusions, correct or otherwise...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wait?! They're all speed related!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the two of use decide on which special
skills Sakura Bakushin O should acquire this year.
